name: USA Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: USA Pawn & Jewelry buys gold, diamonds, and pre-owned merchandise, and offers pawn loans secured by personal items in exchange for immediate cash.
description_long:
USA Pawn & Jewelry operates a pawn shop located at 3046 North 16th Street in Phoenix, Arizona. The company is part of the EZPAWN family of stores and has been serving the Phoenix community as a traditional pawn and collateral-based lending operation.

The company offers multiple cash-access services centered on lending against personal property. Customers can pawn items in working condition to receive immediate loans, sell gold and diamond jewelry directly to the store's expert buyers, or purchase pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25-70% discounts off retail prices. They also offer layaway options with 10% down payments, third-party financing for purchases up to 12 months, and an online shop with daily inventory updates. An EZ+ Rewards Program allows customers to manage pawns and layaways digitally and earn points on eligible transactions.

USA Pawn & Jewelry distinguishes itself through specialized services including a Gold Buying program with precious metal testing for fair pricing, an Instant Quote tool for electronics valuations, and category-specific inventory in firearms, tools, gaming, musical instruments, electronics, and jewelry. They offer Protection Plans for jewelry and electronics purchases, including a Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up benefits. The store maintains extended hours (9am-7pm weekdays and Saturday, 12pm-5pm Sunday) and emphasizes quick cash transactions with minimal friction.

As a pawn shop, USA Pawn & Jewelry is fundamentally a collateral-based lender rather than a credit-building service. Pawn loans carry fees and terms that customers must review with staff. The company explicitly notes that not all services are available in all states, and online payments are specifically unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania—limiting digital convenience for this Phoenix location despite offering the feature elsewhere. This is a transactional service for immediate liquidity, not debt management or long-term financial solutions.
pros: Expert gold and diamond buyers who test precious metals to ensure fair and accurate pricing
Instant Quote tool for electronics provides same-day online valuations before visiting the store
Wide inventory across multiple categories including firearms, tools, gaming, jewelry, and electronics with daily new arrivals
EZ+ Rewards Program allows digital management of pawns, layaways, and online payments (where available)
Flexible payment options including layaway with just 10% down and third-party financing up to 12 months
Extended store hours including Sunday service (12pm-5pm) for accessibility
Protection Plans available for electronics and Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts on future pawns
cons: Online payments explicitly not available in Arizona, Pennsylvania, or Oregon—limiting digital convenience for this Phoenix location despite company-wide offering
Pawn loans subject to undisclosed fees and terms that must be reviewed individually with staff, creating transaction uncertainty
Pre-owned merchandise only; no new items sold, limiting options for customers seeking warranty or manufacturer guarantees
Not a credit-building service; pawn transactions do not help establish or improve credit history
Instant Quote tool limited to electronics; other item categories require in-store evaluation
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash and willing to pledge personal property as collateral
People selling gold, diamonds, or jewelry who want expert assessment and competitive pricing
Budget shoppers seeking brand-name pre-owned electronics, tools, and merchandise at steep discounts
Customers preferring flexible purchase options through layaway or installment payments without traditional credit
diagnosis: USA Pawn & Jewelry is best for consumers who own valuable items and need immediate cash without credit qualification, or who want to purchase discounted pre-owned merchandise. The critical caveat is that pawn loans carry undisclosed fees and terms, online payment functionality is unavailable at this Arizona location, and pawning does not build credit—this is purely a liquidity service, not a financial wellness solution.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property in working condition
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with precious metal testing
Pre-owned retail merchandise sales at 25-70% discounts
Online shop with daily inventory updates and new arrivals
Layaway with 10% down and monthly payment options
Third-party financing for purchases with up to 12-month terms
Instant Quote tool for electronics valuations
EZ+ Rewards Program with points on eligible transactions
Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise
Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up benefits
